# CWE-544: inconsistent ad-hoc error handling across handlers.
lang: go
file: CWE-544-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func FetchProfile(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	var name string
	err := db.Get(&name, "SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id"))
	if err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, name)
}

func FetchBalance(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	var balance float64
	err := db.Get(&balance, "SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Println(err)
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"balance": balance})
}
